info.title: Dnt Service
info.description:
Dnt Service

 **Last update**: 06 feb 26, 04:49 p. m.

tags.name: Custom Promotion Engine
tags.description:
This service work as an asynchronous promotion engine.

Janis sends the `Promotions Query` and waits for a `Promotions Query Result`. Then, it applies the discounts and taxes to the order.

This process occurs only if a custom promotion engine is set up in the [Integration Profile](#tag/Integration-Profile).

[Documentation](https://docs.janis.im/docs/c%C3%B3mo-implementar-un-motor-de-promociones-personalizado)

tags.name: Integration Profile
tags.description:
For managing Integration Profiles

This profiles define whether promotions will be validated or not and with promotions engine should be used.

[Documentation](https://docs.janis.im/docs/rec%C3%A1lculo-de-promociones-post-picking)

tags.name: Order
tags.description: To check orders that have been processed

get.description: Get an Integration Profile by ID

put.description: Update an Integration Profile by ID

get.description: Get a list of Integration Profiles

post.description:
In this payload, promotions and taxes to be processed are expected.

Keep in mind that the values are the amounts to be deducted or added as applicable, and not the final expected price, as these will be calculated by the service.
I.e., a negative value represents a discount amount and a positive value represents a tax amount.

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

IntegrationProfileFilters.name: filters
IntegrationProfileFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

OrderFilters.name: filters
OrderFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

x-janis-total.description: The total amount of records in the list

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userCreated.description: The ID of the user who created the item

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

name.description: The name of the integration profile
The name of the integration config

url.description: The url of the integration config (required if the integration is custom)

headers.description: The headers of the request in case the integration is custom

processOnlyModifiedItems.description: Whether to process only new items, substitute items, and picked items with quantity differences

allOf.description: The id of the order. See [Orders](/v2/service/oms#operation/listOrder)

token.description: A random uuid for custom integration request authorization.

integration.description: The integration type of the request.

error.description: The error when trying to process promotions.

orderPlacementDate.description: Date and time when the order was placed

orderSequentialCommerceId.description: Sequential Commerce ID of the order

account.description: The information of the [Account](https://docs.janisdev.in/v2/service/commerce#operation/getAccount) where the order was placed.

ecommerceName.description: The name of the Account in the ecommerce platform

referenceId.description: The Reference ID of the Account

platform.description: The name of the platform of the Account

ids.description: A key-value object containing seller external IDs

items.description: List of items in the order

id.description: A unique identifier for the item. This must be used in the Promotions Query Result for taxes/discounts that apply to items.

sellingQuantity.description:
The quantity of the item that the customer bought. This will always be an integer.

**This property is deprecated, use `totalQuantity` instead.**

actualQuantity.description:
The quantity of the item actually picked. For weighable items, this can be a decimal number.

**This property is deprecated, use `pickedTotalQuantity` instead.**

totalQuantity.description: The total quantity of the item that the customer originally purchased (purchasedQuantity * sellingUnitMultiplier). Null when the item is a substitute.

pickedTotalQuantity.description: The total quantity of the item actually picked from the picking result. For weighable items, this can be a decimal number and can be null when the order is not picked.

skuEan.description: The picked EAN code for the SKU. For weighable items, this will contain the variable portion of the EAN with the corresponding values.

payments.description: List of payments associated with the order

paymentMethodName.description: The name of the payment system

valueWithInterests.description: Value of the payment including interests

companyName.description: The company that will deliver the items

countryCode.description: Country code for the shipping destination

start.description: The initial date of the delivery

end.description: The final date of the delivery

geolocation.description: The coordinates of the address. First element is longitude, second is latitude.

postalCode.description: Postal code for the delivery address

slaName.description: The name of the selected SLA

coupons.description: List of coupons associated with the order

token.description: This must be the `token` from the Promotions Query.

items.description: A key-value object containing the promotions and taxes applied to each item.

additionalProperties.description: A unique identifier for the item. This must be an `id` of an item from the Promotions Query.

items.description: A discount/tax applied to the item

commerceId.description: The ID of the tax/promotion from the Promotions engine.

value.description:
The amount of the tax/promotion. This value represents the total sum that applies to the entire item.

This value is always a fixed amount applied directly to the order total, not a percentage.

A negative value means a discount, while a positive value means a tax.

error.description: An error that occurred during the promotions query

DefaultStructureOfPromotionTax.description: A list of taxes and/or discounts

name.description: The name of the tax/promotion in the Promotions engine

value.description:
The amount of the tax/promotion

This value is always a fixed amount applied directly to the order total, not a percentage.

A negative value means a discount, while a positive value means a tax.

verificationCode.description: The verification code of the coupon

post.description:
This event is triggered when an order is picked to check if current promotions or taxes still apply, or if new ones should be applied instead.

This webhook expects a 2xx response in no more than 5 seconds.

See details about delivery policy and retries [here](https://docs.janis.im/docs/c%C3%B3mo-implementar-un-motor-de-promociones-personalizado#promotions-query).
